overview: ScanText Pro is a premium mobile-first OCR web app that lets you capture, extract, and organize text from any document, receipt, business card, or handwritten note. Powered by Google Cloud Vision AI with a polished, production-quality interface.
features: Camera capture and gallery image upload for scanning
AI-powered OCR text extraction in 7 languages (English, Hindi, Arabic, Urdu, Marathi, Tamil, Malayalam)
Image enhancement with brightness, contrast, and filter controls
Editable OCR results with one-tap copy to clipboard
Scan history with full-text search across all documents
Export to TXT, PDF, DOCX, and CSV formats
Text-to-speech: listen to extracted text aloud
Smart post-OCR suggestions: Translate, Summarize, Export PDF, Save Contact, Share
Free tier (10 scans/day) and Premium subscription via Stripe
Mobile-first responsive design with bottom navigation
